title: Path world - for Shorts de jaQue ⏯️
description: A mod which adds PATH BLOCK uses. If you don't love the path divinity, this mod is not for you (it's a joke).
body:
This mod adds blocks and items related to the grass path block.
The path sword :
You can craft a path upgrade template with six grass paths, two dirt and a netherite upgrade template.
With this template, you can upgrade a netherite sword in a smithing table using a netherite sword, a path upgrade template and a grass path.
The path sword is powerful !
The stony path :
You can craft a stony path with two grass paths and two cobblestone blocks.
The grass path can be crafted with a shovel and four dirt blocks.
The path bricks :
You can craft path bricks with four grass paths, or with a stonecutter.
Liquid path :
You can craft the liquid path bucket by putting a water bucket in a stonecutter.
Path powder :
You put a grass path in a furnace, and you'll obtain a path powder.
Compressed path :
You can craft it by putting three path powders on each side of the crafting grid, a copper ingot at the top of the grid, an iron ingot at the bottom of the grid, and a sand/red sand block in the center.
Path dimension :
The portal is made of compressed paths, and the igniter's recipe is : three grass paths, a nether quartz, and a flint and steel.
There's just two biomes in the dimension : the path plains and the stony path plains
Path flower :
It can be crafted by putting a poppy in a stonecutter.
